The '''Dernatine system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep sector]], part of the that [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Boonta/Legends|Boonta]] and was also considered a part of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].

The Dernatine system was a notable [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-[[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] system.<ref name="TEA" />

{{System-stub}}
